name: Terrazzina Beach
description: The best beach in Old Market
fullDescription: The best beach in Old Market
menuContent: Beach bar and restaurant available on site
ticketsContent:
<div class="tickets-template">
  <div class="tickets-header">
    <div class="tickets-icon">
      <i class="fas fa-umbrella-beach"></i>
    </div>
    <h3>Beach Admission & Activities</h3>
    <p class="tickets-subtitle">Experience paradise with our premium services</p>
  </div>
  
  <div class="tickets-section">
    <h4><i class="fas fa-ticket-alt"></i> Daily Admission</h4>
    <div class="ticket-item">
      <div class="ticket-details">
        <span class="ticket-name">General Admission</span>
        <span class="ticket-description">Beach access from 8 AM to 6 PM</span>
      </div>
      <span class="ticket-price free">FREE</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ticket-item">
      <div class="ticket-details">
        <span class="ticket-name">Premium Sunbed Package</span>
        <span class="ticket-description">Sunbed + Umbrella + Beach Towel</span>
      </div>
      <span class="ticket-price">150 EGP</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ticket-item featured">
      <div class="ticket-details">
        <span class="ticket-name">VIP Cabana Package</span>
        <span class="ticket-description">Private cabana with waiter service (max 4 persons)</span>
      </div>
      <span class="ticket-price">800 EGP</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="tickets-section">
    <h4><i class="fas fa-water"></i> Water Sports</h4>
    <div class="ticket-item">
      <div class="ticket-details">
        <span class="ticket-name">Snorkeling Adventure</span>
        <span class="ticket-description">1 hour guided tour with equipment</span>
      </div>
      <span class="ticket-price">250 EGP</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ticket-item">
      <div class="ticket-details">
        <span class="ticket-name">Jet Ski Thrill</span>
        <span class="ticket-description">30 minutes of high-speed fun</span>
      </div>
      <span class="ticket-price">400 EGP</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ticket-item">
      <div class="ticket-details">
        <span class="ticket-name">Parasailing Experience</span>
        <span class="ticket-description">Breathtaking views from above</span>
      </div>
      <span class="ticket-price">600 EGP</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="tickets-section">
    <h4><i class="fas fa-users"></i> Family & Group Packages</h4>
    <div class="ticket-item">
      <div class="ticket-details">
        <span class="ticket-name">Family Day Pass (2 Adults + 2 Kids)</span>
        <span class="ticket-description">Includes 2 sunbeds and activities for kids</span>
      </div>
      <span class="ticket-price">1200 EGP</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ticket-item">
      <div class="ticket-details">
        <span class="ticket-name">Group Package (6+ Persons)</span>
        <span class="ticket-description">20% discount on all activities</span>
      </div>
      <span class="ticket-price discount">20% OFF</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="tickets-footer">
    <div class="ticket-note">
      <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
      <span>Operating Hours: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ticket-note">
      <i class="fas fa-shield-alt"></i>
      <span>All equipment sanitized & safety certified</span>
    </div>
    <div class="ticket-note">
      <i class="fas fa-life-ring"></i>
      <span>Lifeguards on duty at all times</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
.tickets-template {
  font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
  color: #333;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* Header Styles */
.tickets-header {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  padding-bottom: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #00B4D8;
}

.tickets-icon {
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 2.5rem);
  color: #00B4D8;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.tickets-header h3 {
  color: #00B4D8;
  font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 4vw, 1.5rem);
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.tickets-subtitle {
  color: #666;
  font-size: clamp(0.8rem, 3vw, 0.9rem);
  font-style: italic;
}

/* Section Styles */
.tickets-section {
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.tickets-section h4 {
  color: #1A1A2E;
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 3.5vw, 1.2rem);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.tickets-section h4 i {
  color: #00B4D8;
  font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 3vw, 1rem);
}

/* Ticket Item Styles - Mobile First */
.ticket-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  padding: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  background: #f0f9ff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border-left: 3px solid #4CC9F0;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

@media (min-width: 480px) {
  .ticket-item {
    flex-direction: row;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
  }
}

.ticket-item:hover {
  transform: translateX(3px);
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.ticket-item.featured {
  border-left-color: #00B4D8;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e0f2fe 0%, #fff 100%);
}

.ticket-details {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
}

.ticket-name {
  display: block;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1A1A2E;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 3vw, 1.05rem);
  word-break: break-word;
}

.ticket-description {
  display: block;
  font-size: clamp(0.8rem, 2.5vw, 0.85rem);
  color: #666;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

/* Price Styles */
.ticket-price {
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 3vw, 1rem);
  white-space: nowrap;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 20px;
  text-align: center;
  align-self: flex-start;
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
}

@media (min-width: 480px) {
  .ticket-price {
    margin-top: 0;
    margin-left: 0.5rem;
  }
}

.ticket-price:not(.free):not(.discount) {
  color: #00B4D8;
  background: rgba(0, 180, 216, 0.1);
}

.ticket-price.free {
  color: #10B981;
  background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.1);
}

.ticket-price.discount {
  color: #EF4444;
  background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1);
}

/* Footer Styles */
.tickets-footer {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  padding-top: 1rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

.ticket-note {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  font-size: clamp(0.8rem, 2.5vw, 0.9rem);
  color: #475569;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border-radius: 8px;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.ticket-note i {
  color: #00B4D8;
  min-width: 20px;
  font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 3vw, 1rem);
  margin-top: 0.1rem;
}

/* Small Phone Optimization */
@media (max-width: 360px) {
  .ticket-item {
    padding: 0.75rem;
  }
  
  .ticket-section h4 {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
  }
  
  .ticket-name {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }
  
  .ticket-price {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
  }
  
  .ticket-note {
    padding: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
  }
}

/* Tablet Optimization */
@media (min-width: 640px) {
  .tickets-footer {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
  }
  
  .ticket-note {
    height: 100%;
  }
}

/* Large Screen Optimization */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .tickets-template {
    padding: 0.5rem;
  }
  
  .ticket-item {
    padding: 1.25rem;
  }
}
</style>
